meaning: n.专门看管市镇,教区的篱笆以防牲畜闯入的人
examples: The Hayward exhibition has been curated by the artist Bernard Luthi.
Tony Hayward remains the chief executive of BP.
Hayward started at BP as a rig geologist in 1982.
The chant will be heard again when Wolves president Sir Jack Hayward unveils the plaque.
Prefontaine died in a car accident hours after running his last race at Hayward Field.
